title: cynanchum caudatum
intro: Cynanchum caudatum, also known as the Korean milkvetch or Taeyeon, is a perennial plant belonging to the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cynanchum caudatum include reducing fever, alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections, and potentially lowering blood sugar levels. In herbal preparations, Cynanchum caudatum is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal dosages.
